DSC259 Final Project: Power Outages

Following the data science lifecycle for major power outage risk in the U.S.

Dig in!

Accessing Data

Major Power Outage Risks in the U.S.: This dataset includes the major outages witnessed by different states in the continental U.S. Besides major outages, this data contains information on geographical location of the outages, regional climatic information, land-use characteristics, electricity consumption patterns, and economic characteristics of the states affected by the outages.

Download Data

Step 6

Step 7

Step 8
Fairness Analysis
